text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One night during camp...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've been pondering, Trainer. Has this thought
ever dawned upon you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
People say that the ruler of the sea, Poseidon,
and the power he grants are merely the stuff of
fairy tales.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But Poseidon does exist.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Go on, listen for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh! Fsshhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash, splash...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Can you not hear something emerging from the
deep?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Poseidon has come to spark the next stage of my
evolution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash, splash...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It does sound like footsteps in the water. But they
couldn't possibly belong to Poseidon...
Heh heh, heh heh heh heh!
Your god of the sea doesn't exist. But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Phantom Bird does!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gah! It's you?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Es verdad! I'm the world's strongest, a member of
the Golden Generation, and I'm hot on your
heels!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa, the Phantom Bird, has landed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A superstar runner with worldwide acclaim now
stands before us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's one of the Umamusume from the Golden
Generation that T.M. Opera O has set her sights
on.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know who you are, Opera O. You're the one
aimin' to be the top ruler!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But in this battle royale, you're on the receivin'
end of everyone's attack. It's gonna be a world of
hurt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: H-how do you know this?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've got a bird's-eye view over everything. There's
nothin' that happens without me knowin'.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So, I'll offer ya some pointers. Then you can fight
with your head held high and come out victorious,
no matter how many people are after ya!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Lending your strength to the Overlord, are
you? Most appreciated!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So, what do we do first? Some partner running?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're gonna wrestle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna learn to fight, there's nothin' better
than wrestlin'! Go put on your ring attire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure why, but Opera O ends up
wrestling against El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Kay, Opera O, bring it! Fight like the overlord
you say you are!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What're ya gonna do when everyone's bearin'
down on you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Try takin' this, for starters! Condor Rush!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa unleashes a flurry of karate chops!
T.M. Opera O, on the receiving end...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah hah hah! 'Tis a simple matter!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With my adept stage dancing, I can evade any
and all attacks by the slimmest of margins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You see? This is how a true ruler does battle!
Even if I come under a barrage of cannon fire, I
can use my conserved energy to attain total
victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's right, isn't it, El? This is what you wished to
convey!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Interestin'. Sure, that style does conserve energy,
but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's not how a ruler fights!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Does an overlord just run and run, sneakin' their
way to victory?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh! What?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even if ya win, ya can't call that victory. That's no
lordly fightin'... That's a tactic for cravens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh?! Craven! I have never been paired with
such a humiliating title!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To have become the Craven Lord in my quest for
strength—ohh, how I have fallen.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll show ya the type of fightin' you should be
striving for!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Opera O! Lemme have your best finishing
move!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My... ultimate Overlord technique?! The one
which can obliterate six galaxies in a flash?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This has gotten way too ridiculous for me to butt
in. I decide to sit back and just watch.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Hehehe... As you wish. Do not regret it when
you disintegrate to dust.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Prepare for my supreme move! The Overlord
Principal Galaxion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She unleashes an explosive technique that defies
all words!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mnrrrgh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! You took the blow head-on?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How can you still stand?! More importantly, why
did you not evade? You're more than capable.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Why? 'Cause this is how a ruler fights!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Take everything they throw at ya... and win. A
true champ doesn't run, even when it's you
against everyone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Takin' one on the chin gets the fans riveted!
Fightin' back makes 'em roar!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Prove you've got the most muscle and overpower
every last hit! That's what a real champ does!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! She vanished...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WHOMP!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa drives T.M. Opera O into the sand
with a powerful, high-speed tackle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, ding!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The match is over, and important lessons have
been learned.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have my thanks, El. My eyes are finally open
after that flawless blow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even if my entire competition singles me out, I
must meet them head-on. That is what makes the
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No... That is how the Centurial Overlord does battle. Do I have it correct this time?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí. Tryin' for distance just means you're afraid of
gettin' passed.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The strong don't care if they win by a nose, 'cause
they know for a fact nobody'll overtake 'em.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And with that said, hasta luego!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I swear to turn your teachings into shining
success on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the Phantom Bird returns to the sea.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Argh! Gulp! Ptoo! I shouldn't have tried to swim back!
